raw_response_text:
<features>
- petal color: purple/lavender
- petal shape: broad, pointed petals
- center: prominent cluster of light-colored stamens/pistils
</features>
<kb>
- IF [petal color = purple/lavender AND center = prominent light-colored stamens] THEN [81]
- IF [petal color = yellow AND petal shape = drooping/curved] THEN [14]
</kb>

<rule_check>
- The rule for class 81 fires because the Query Image shows purple/lavender flowers with broad petals and a prominent light-colored center.
</rule_check>

<response>81</response>
